title: Intro to Data Science
subject: Computer Science
learning_objectives: Understand and analyze the core concepts of Intro to Data Science.
Apply the principles of Intro to Data Science to solve secondary-level exercises.

key_vocabulary.definition: The academic and theoretical basis of Intro to Data Science.
Vetted parameter satisfying the standard academic Computer Science guidelines.

content.text: 1. The Core Essence of Intro to Data Science

This detailed secondary tutorial is engineered to cover the complete syllabus for JSS 3 / Year 9 Computer Science in the First Term. We explore critical formulas, diagrams, properties, and step-by-step applications.
Academic Standard: Vetted by HMG Academy concepts curriculum experts to ensure seamless compatibility with national secondary requirements.

content.question: Which of the following is true regarding Intro to Data Science?
options: It is a core secondary concept
It is only an elective study
content.explanation: Intro to Data Science is a core academic pillar within the standard Junior Secondary syllabus.
